name: HORSESHOE KIDNEY
definition: two kidneys joined at poles by parenchymal / fibrous isthmus
dominant_finding: fusion of R + L kidney at lower (90%) / upper (10%) pole
discriminating_features: fusion of R + L kidney at lower (90%) / upper (10%) pole
isthmus at L4-5 between aorta + inferior mesenteric artery
renal pelves and ureters situated anteriorly
multiple renal arteries including isthmus artery

general: fusion of R + L kidney at lower (90%) / upper (10%) pole
isthmus at L4-5 between aorta + inferior mesenteric artery
renal pelves and ureters situated anteriorly
multiple renal arteries including isthmus artery
